scripts.dist:win: vite build && electron-packager . "Nexans Affiche" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --asar --out=dist-electron --overwrite --ignore="^/(?!dist|electron|package\.json)" --extra-resource=electron/nexans-ascii.txt && cp electron/launcher.bat "dist-electron/Lancer Nexans Affiche.bat" && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'dist-electron\\Nexans Affiche-win32-x64\\locales' | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @('fr.pak','en-US.pak') } | Remove-Item -Force" && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path 'dist-electron\\Nexans Affiche-win32-x64','dist-electron\\Lancer Nexans Affiche.bat' -DestinationPath dist-electron\\NexansAffiche-win-x64.zip -Force"
